labels.name: rfc
labels.purpose: Public design proposal requiring discussion and maintainer decision

labels.name: task:ready
labels.purpose: Scope, source, acceptance, and verification gates are actionable

labels.name: task:claimed
labels.purpose: A maintainer-confirmed, time-limited claim lease is active

labels.name: task:review
labels.purpose: Implementation or evidence awaits independent review

labels.name: task:blocked
labels.purpose: A concrete dependency, permission, decision, or device is missing

labels.name: device-lab
labels.purpose: Work produces or reviews a device profile or receipt

labels.name: needs-device:pico
labels.purpose: Requires evidence from the declared PICO profile

labels.name: needs-device:quest
labels.purpose: Requires evidence from the declared Meta Quest profile

labels.name: needs-device:vision-pro
labels.purpose: Requires evidence from the declared Apple Vision Pro profile

labels.name: security-boundary
labels.purpose: Permission, workflow, secret, or untrusted-input review required
